mysite
Table of Contents

Interface IUnitOfWork

Namespace
DAL.Contracts
Assembly
DAL.dll

Defines a transactional scope that shares a single database connection across multiple repositories.

public interface IUnitOfWork : IDisposable
Inherited Members
IDisposable.Dispose()

Remarks

Obtain a new instance from CreateUnitOfWork(). The intended usage pattern is: 

using (var uow = DalFactory.CreateUnitOfWork())
{
    uow.BeginTransaction();
    // use uow.*Repository to perform coordinated writes
    uow.Commit();
}

If Commit() is never called, Dispose() will automatically roll back any open transaction when the using block exits.

Properties

AgendaRepository

Repository for agenda (operating schedule) operations.

Methods

BeginTransaction()

Opens the shared database connection and begins a transaction.

void BeginTransaction()

Commit()

Commits all pending changes and closes the connection.

void Commit()

Rollback()

Discards all pending changes and closes the connection.

void Rollback()
